chunks.title: Famine and Family Deaths in Moab
chunks.reason: Establishes the setting of famine and the deaths of Elimelech and his two sons.

chunks.title: Naomi's Departure and Daughters-in-Law's Response
chunks.reason: Describes the journey back to Judah and Naomi's initial attempt to send them away.

chunks.title: Ruth's Vow of Loyalty
chunks.reason: Contains the pivotal speech where Ruth commits to Naomi and her God.

chunks.title: Arrival in Bethlehem and Naomi's Lament
chunks.reason: Concludes with their arrival, the town's reaction, and Naomi's renaming to Mara.

chunks.title: Ruth Arrives at Boaz's Field
chunks.reason: Introduces Boaz and Ruth's decision to glean in his field.

chunks.title: Boaz Inquires and Commands Ruth
chunks.reason: Boaz greets reapers, identifies Ruth, and gives her instructions.

chunks.title: Ruth's Humility and Boaz's Blessing
chunks.reason: Ruth responds to Boaz's kindness with gratitude and receives a meal.

chunks.title: Boaz Ensures Ruth's Harvest
chunks.reason: Boaz instructs workers to leave extra grain for Ruth and she finishes gleaning.

chunks.title: Ruth Returns and Naomi's Reaction
chunks.reason: Ruth brings grain to Naomi, who recognizes Boaz as a kinsman redeemer.

chunks.title: Naomi's Plan for Ruth
chunks.reason: Naomi instructs Ruth on how to approach Boaz and Ruth agrees.

chunks.title: Ruth at the Threshing Floor
chunks.reason: Narrative of Ruth's actions at the threshing floor and Boaz's response.

chunks.title: Ruth Reports to Naomi
chunks.reason: Ruth returns to Naomi and they discuss the outcome of the meeting.

chunks.title: Boaz Redeems the Land and Ruth
chunks.reason: Narrative of the legal transaction at the gate involving Boaz, the kinsman redeemer, and the elders.

chunks.title: Birth of Obed and Naomi's Restoration
chunks.reason: Narrative of Ruth bearing a son, the women's blessing to Naomi, and the naming of Obed.

chunks.title: Genealogy from Perez to David
chunks.reason: List of generations tracing the lineage from Perez through Boaz and Obed to King David.
